data.title: Pierrick Lefranc named EVP Technical Operations at Ipsen, to join ELT on 1 April 2026. Aidan Murphy retiring after 30 years.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Ipsen disclosed the appointment of Pierrick Lefranc as the new Executive Vice President and member of the Executive Leadership Team, effective from April 1, 2026. Pierrick will be taking over from Aidan Murphy, the current EVP of Technical Operations and ELT member, who will retire in March 2026 after 30 years of dedicated service at Ipsen. This announcement comes as the company's stocks trade on Euronext under IPN and ADR under IPSEY.

data.title: IBA to deliver fourth Proteus®ONE system to MacKay Memorial Hospital in Taiwan, solidifying its market leader status.
data.description: In Louvain-La-Neuve, Belgium on January 27, 2026, IBA (Ion Beam Applications S.A., EURONEXT) revealed signing a deal for providing a Proteus ® ONE 1 compact proton therapy solution to be set up at the MacKay Memorial Hospital in New Taipei City, Taiwan. This procurement marks the fourth order for a Proteus ® ONE system in Taiwan, showcasing IBA’s dominance as the primary provider in the market for proton therapy solutions for cancer treatment.

data.title: Merko Kodud launches second phase of Õielehe development in Rae parish; 33 apartments to be completed by spring 2027.
data.description: Merko Kodud, a subsidiary of AS Merko Ehitus, has announced the initiation of the next phase of the Õielehe development project in Rae parish, Jüri. This phase will include the construction of three apartment buildings containing a combined total of 33 apartments, expected to be finalized by spring 2027 at Õie 6, Õie 8, and Õie 10. Additionally, sales will commence for a five-apartment terraced house located at Õie 1.

data.title: Roche's Phase II trial of dual GLP-1/GIP receptor agonist CT-388 showed 22.5% weight loss, with 95.7% achieving ≥5% at 24 mg dose.
data.description: Basel, 27 January 2026 - Roche shared positive findings today from the CT388-103 Phase II clinical trial of CT-388, a dual GLP-1/GIP receptor agonist under development for obesity. Results showed that weekly subcutaneous CT-388 doses up to 24 mg led to notable weight loss of 22.5% compared to placebo at 48 weeks. A dose-dependent weight loss trend was evident. The treatment-regimen analysis revealed a placebo-adjusted weight reduction of 18.3% (p-value < 0.001). By the 48th week, for the 24 mg dose, 95.7% of CT-388 recipients achieved ≥5% weight loss, 87% achieved ≥10%, 47.8% achieved ≥20%, and 26.1% achieved ≥30%. Among pre-diabetic participants at baseline, 73% treated with 24 mg of CT-388 reached normal blood glucose levels at week 48, a stark contrast to the 7.5% in the placebo group.

data.title: TGS wins OBN contract in Europe, mobilizing crew for 30-day project in mid-summer.
data.description: Norway's capital, Oslo, witnessed an announcement on 27th January 2026 from TGS, a prominent energy data and intelligence provider, regarding securing another contract for ocean bottom nodes (OBN) in Europe. TGS will deploy their node-on-a-rope team by mid-summer for this project, set to last around 30 days.

data.title: Senate and government offices in US closed due to severe winter storm, delaying crypto market structure bill.
data.description: On Monday, the United States experienced severe storm conditions, leading to the closure of the Senate and numerous other government offices.

data.title: Primax Tymphany Group invests in Soundskrit for AI sensor fusion tech, advancing Edge AI innovation. Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: Taipei, January 27, 2026 - Primax Tymphany Group, a global technology company focusing on advancing AI Sensor Fusion (AISF), disclosed a strategic investment in Soundskrit, a developer renowned for directional MEMS microphone technology. This move aims to bolster core audio sensing capabilities to drive innovation in Edge AI.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric and Landis+Gyr collaborate to advance grid edge intelligence, signed MOU for business collaboration.
data.description: In a joint announcement on Jan. 27, 2026, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation and Landis+Gyr (SIX: LAND) disclosed their agreement via a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to enhance grid edge intelligence and hasten the shift towards cleaner energy. The MOU is intended to bolster collaboration between the two companies to drive advancements in this sector.

data.title: HIP-3 open-interest surges to $793M as commodities spike. Stake 500,000 HYPE to create perpetual futures on Hyperliquid.
data.description: Hyperliquid's latest feature, HIP-3 or "Builder Deployed Perpetuals," enables users to establish a new perpetual futures market on the Hyperliquid blockchain by staking 500,000 HYPE tokens.

data.title: Australia flags crypto oversight concerns for 2026, aims to address regulatory gaps through new licensing laws.
data.description: As Canberra takes steps to address regulatory gaps in the digital-asset sector, a caution has been issued. This comes alongside the introduction of long-awaited licensing legislation aimed at bolstering oversight and control.
